message:
fix(wasm): stricter type validation for WASM call results

Harden the WASM-JS bridge to reject unsupported return value types
at the boundary rather than silently producing wrong results:

- val_to_f64() now returns Result and throws a proper RuntimeError for
  unrecognised Val variants instead of silently returning 0.0
- New validate_call_result_types() rejects multi-value returns and
  externref/funcref types with descriptive error messages
- i64 rejection moved into the centralised validator
- Two new tests: call_export_multivalue_result_is_rejected and
  call_export_externref_result_is_rejected verify the error paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
